# Providers

Configure providers and find setup instructions in the [dashboard](https://dashboard.workos.com/environment/pipes).

| Provider | Slug | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Acuity Scheduling | `acuity-scheduling` | Connect Acuity Scheduling to read appointments, calendars, clients, forms, products, and availability. |
| Addepar | `addepar` | Access Addepar portfolio, transactions, entities, positions, reports, and billing data. |
| Adobe | `adobe` | Use Adobe IMS OAuth to access Creative Cloud and Experience Cloud APIs on behalf of an Adobe user. |
| Aimfox | `aimfox` | Automate LinkedIn outreach, manage leads, conversations, campaigns, and labels with Aimfox. |
| Aircall | `aircall` | Use Aircall's REST API with OAuth 2.0 to access calls, contacts, numbers, users, teams, tags, and webhooks. |
| Airtable | `airtable` | Manage records and bases in flexible spreadsheet databases. |
| Apaleo | `apaleo` | Connect Apaleo property management data including reservations, rates, availability, folios, invoices, and account settings. |
| Apollo.io | `apollo-oauth` | Access Apollo.io contacts, people, accounts, opportunities, and sales engagement data. |
| Asana | `asana` | Manage projects and tasks with connected team workflows. |
| Atlassian | `atlassian` | Use Atlassian's 3LO OAuth to access Jira, Confluence, Jira Service Management, Assets, and Cloud Admin resources. |
| Attio | `attio` | Attio is a flexible, customer-data-shaped CRM. Connecting Attio lets Pipes sync records (people, companies, custom objects), lists and list entries, notes, tasks, comments, meetings, call recordings, and webhooks. |
| Autodesk | `autodesk` | Use Autodesk Platform Services to access design data, buckets, user profiles, viewables, and Autodesk Construction Cloud account resources. |
| Bing Webmasters | `bing-webmasters` | Read and manage Bing Webmaster Tools data such as sites, URL submissions, crawl stats, and keyword performance. |
| Bitbucket | `bitbucket` | Use Bitbucket Cloud OAuth to access source code, repositories, pull requests, issues, snippets, wikis, webhooks, projects, pipelines, runners, workspaces, and account data with user-approved OAuth consumer scopes. |
| Bitly | `bitly` | Shorten links, generate QR codes, and read click analytics for your Bitly account. |
| Blackbaud | `blackbaud` | Use the Blackbaud SKY API to read and update fundraising, constituent, education, and financial data across Blackbaud cloud solutions. |
| BoldSign | `boldsign` | Use BoldSign's REST API with OAuth 2.0 to send, manage, and track documents, templates, teams, users, and sender identities for eSignature workflows. |
| Box | `box` | Securely store, share, and collaborate on cloud files. |
| Braintree | `braintree` | Connect Braintree merchants to access transactions, customers, payment methods, subscriptions, disputes, and settlements via OAuth. |
| Brex | `brex` | Use Brex OAuth to access spend management data across cards, expenses, transactions, budgets, vendors, transfers, accounting, custom fields, team, and travel. |
| Buffer | `buffer` | Use Buffer's API to manage social media posts, drafts, scheduled content, ideas, channels, and account information. |
| Cal.com | `cal-dot-com` | Open-source scheduling platform for meetings and appointments. |
| Calendly | `calendly` | Schedule and manage appointments, meetings, and events. |
| Candis | `candis` | Connect Candis to sync accounting core data and export approved invoices. |
| Canva | `canva` | Use Canva Connect APIs to access designs, assets, brand templates, folders, comments, and user profile data. |
| CleverReach | `cleverreach` | Sync email marketing data from CleverReach including recipient groups, campaigns, forms, reports, and subscriber activity. |
| ClickUp | `clickup` | Manage tasks, docs, and projects across team workspaces. |
| Close | `close` | Connect Close CRM to sync leads, contacts, opportunities, tasks, calls, emails, and other sales workflow data. |
| Cloudbeds | `cloudbeds` | Sync hospitality data from Cloudbeds including reservations, guests, rooms, rates, housekeeping, payments, and property insights. |
| Confluence | `confluence` | Create, organize, and collaborate on team documentation. |
| Constant Contact | `constant-contact` | Sync Constant Contact contacts, lists, campaigns, and account data for marketing workflows. |
| Conta Azul | `conta-azul` | Sync accounting, finance, sales, and customer data from the Conta Azul ERP. |
| Contentful | `contentful` | Read and manage Contentful spaces, content, assets, and entries. |
| Copper | `copper` | Use Copper's Developer API with OAuth 2.0 to read and modify CRM records such as people, companies, opportunities, leads, projects, tasks, and activities. |
| Datadog | `datadog` | Connect Datadog to access monitoring, incident, metrics, dashboard, and workflow data via OAuth-scoped API access. |
| Datasite | `datasite` | Manage virtual data rooms, projects, and documents for M&A workflows. |
| DATEV | `datev` | Use DATEV's OAuth 2.0 APIs to access accounting clients, documents, EXTF files, HR files, payroll reports, tax documents, and master client data. |
| Deel | `deel` | Use Deel's API with OAuth 2.0 to access HR, contracts, payroll, invoices, time tracking, time off, equities, benefits, and Deel IT data. |
| Dialpad | `dialpad` | Manage calls, messages, contacts, and call center activity. |
| DigitalOcean | `digitalocean` | Manage Droplets, Kubernetes, databases, App Platform, and other DigitalOcean cloud resources. |
| Digits | `digits` | Use Digits Connect to sync ledger data, manage documents, organizations, and users in the Autonomous General Ledger. |
| Discord | `discord` | Use Discord OAuth2 to authenticate users and access approved Discord API capabilities, including user profiles, email, connections, guild membership, application commands, bot installs, incoming webhooks, RPC features, and Social SDK presence or communication scopes. |
| DocuSign | `docusign` | Docusign is an agreement platform for preparing, signing, sending, managing, and analyzing agreements. Connect Docusign to sync eSignature envelopes, templates, rooms, web forms, organization administration, and related agreement data through Docusign APIs. |
| DrChrono | `drchrono` | Use the DrChrono (EverHealth) EHR API to access patients, calendar, clinical, billing, labs, messages, tasks, settings, and user resources. |
| Dropbox | `dropbox` | Sync, share, and back up files in the cloud. |
| Dropbox Sign | `dropbox-sign` | Use Dropbox Sign's REST API with OAuth 2.0 to send signature requests, manage templates, access account and team data, and administer embedded API apps. |
| Employment Hero | `employment-hero` | Manage HR, payroll, and employee records across organisations. |
| Envoy | `envoy` | Manage visitor sign-ins, employees, invites, locations, desks, and reservations in Envoy. |
| Eventbrite | `eventbrite` | Manage events, attendees, orders, and ticketing from Eventbrite. |
| Factorial | `factorial` | Access Factorial HR data including employees, contracts, payroll, time off, time tracking, expenses, performance, and recruitment. |
| Fathom | `fathom` | Access Fathom meeting recordings, transcripts, summaries, action items, teams, and webhooks for AI-notetaker workflows. |
| Figma | `figma` | Use Figma's REST API with OAuth 2.0 to read design file content and metadata, manage comments and dev resources, inspect projects and libraries, work with variables and webhooks, and access organization-level logs where permitted. |
| Fly.io | `fly-io` | Use Fly.io OAuth for extension single sign-on, allowing approved extension providers to identify Fly.io users, inspect their organization memberships and roles, and route users into provider dashboards. |
| Fortnox | `fortnox` | Sync Swedish accounting data from Fortnox including invoices, customers, suppliers, articles, payments, vouchers, and payroll. |
| Frame.io | `frame-io` | Collaborate on video projects with review and approval workflows. |
| Frame.io V4 | `frame-io-v4` | Collaborate on video projects with review and approval workflows. |
| FreeAgent | `freeagent` | Manage accounting, invoicing, expenses, and tax data for small businesses. |
| FreshBooks | `freshbooks` | Manage invoices, expenses, clients, payments, and accounting in FreshBooks. |
| Front | `front` | Manage customer communications and team collaboration in one inbox. |
| Getty Images | `getty-images` | Search, license, and download Getty Images and iStock creative and editorial assets. |
| GitHub | `github` | Collaborate on code, issues, and pull requests securely. |
| GitLab | `gitlab` | Manage repositories, CI/CD pipelines, and code collaboration. |
| Gmail | `gmail` | Access, send, and organize emails with Gmail integration. |
| Gong | `gong` | Connect to access Gong call recordings, transcripts, and revenue insights. |
| Google | `google` | Connect your Google account to integrate with Google services. |
| Google Calendar | `google-calendar` | Schedule events, manage time, and share availability. |
| Google Drive | `google-drive` | Store, share, and collaborate on cloud-based documents. |
| Grain | `grain` | Access Grain meeting recordings, transcripts, highlights, hooks, users, teams, and meeting types. |
| Greenhouse | `greenhouse` | Use Greenhouse Harvest OAuth to access recruiting data such as jobs, candidates, applications, interviews, offers, users, offices, departments, scorecards, and related hiring workflow resources. |
| Greenhouse (Ingestion API) | `greenhouse-ingestion` | Use Greenhouse's Candidate Ingestion API to submit prospects and candidates, retrieve candidate stage and status, and list eligible jobs. |
| Gusto | `gusto` | Gusto is a payroll, benefits, and HR platform for small and growing businesses. Connect Gusto to sync company, employee, contractor, payroll, benefits, time tracking, reports, and webhook data through the Gusto App Integrations API. |
| Harvest | `harvest` | Sync Harvest time tracking, projects, tasks, clients, invoices, expenses, and team data. |
| Health Gorilla | `health-gorilla` | Access patient clinical data, lab orders, and FHIR resources across providers. |
| Help Scout | `helpscout` | Deliver excellent customer support with help desk and knowledge base tools. |
| HeyGen | `heygen` | Generate AI avatar videos and manage HeyGen video assets, templates, and voices. |
| HOVER | `hover` | Access HOVER measurements, 3D models, and property data for home exteriors via the HOVER API. |
| HubSpot | `hubspot` | Track leads, manage marketing, and automate sales pipelines. |
| Intercom | `intercom` | Engage customers with in-app messaging and support tools. |
| Intralinks | `intralinks` | Access virtual data rooms, documents, and deal information. |
| Jira | `jira` | Track issues, bugs, and agile project workflows. |
| Jobber | `jobber` | Use Jobber's GraphQL API to access clients, requests, quotes, jobs, visits, invoices, payments, and users for field service management. |
| Kakao | `kakao` | Use Kakao Login OAuth to access Kakao Account profile and contact information, OpenID Connect identity tokens, Kakao Talk social data, messaging, Talk Calendar resources, channel relationship status, shipping addresses, and account status events with user consent. |
| Keap | `keap` | Manage CRM contacts, sales pipelines, e-commerce orders, and marketing automation in Keap. |
| Klaviyo | `klaviyo` | Klaviyo is a marketing automation and customer data platform for ecommerce businesses. Connect Klaviyo to sync profiles, events, lists, segments, campaigns, flows, catalog data, coupons, subscriptions, templates, tags, reviews, reporting, custom objects, webhooks, and translation data through Klaviyo's OAuth APIs. |
| Lever | `lever` | Lever is an applicant tracking system and talent relationship management platform for managing recruiting pipelines. Connect Lever to sync approved hiring data including opportunities, applications, candidates, postings, offers, interviews, feedback, requisitions, users, webhooks, and related ATS metadata. |
| Linear | `linear` | Streamline issue tracking and product development workflows. |
| LinkedIn | `linkedin` | Use LinkedIn OAuth to access member profile and email data, publish member or organization content, manage ads, retrieve reporting, sync leads and events, and connect approved Marketing, Sales Navigator, Verified, and Compliance API products. |
| Lokalise | `lokalise` | Access Lokalise projects, keys, translations, files, comments, screenshots, tasks, contributors, branches, glossary, webhooks, and team resources. |
| Mailchimp | `mailchimp` | Mailchimp is a marketing automation platform for managing audiences, campaigns, automations, transactional messaging, ecommerce, analytics, and customer journeys. Connect Mailchimp to sync Marketing API data authorized by a Mailchimp user, including contacts, lists, segments, tags, campaigns, reports, templates, files, stores, products, orders, carts, and related account data. |
| Mercury | `mercury` | Read Mercury bank account, transaction, statement, and recipient data through Mercury's OAuth2 API. |
| Microsoft | `microsoft` | Connect your Microsoft account to integrate with Microsoft services. |
| Microsoft OneDrive | `microsoft-onedrive` | Store, sync, and share files across Microsoft cloud. |
| Microsoft OneNote | `microsoft-onenote` | Access and manage notebooks, sections, and notes. |
| Microsoft Outlook | `microsoft-outlook` | Manage email, contacts, and communication seamlessly. |
| Microsoft Outlook Calendar | `microsoft-outlook-calendar` | Schedule meetings and manage calendar events efficiently. |
| Microsoft SharePoint | `microsoft-sharepoint` | Access and manage team sites, document libraries, and content. |
| Microsoft Teams | `microsoft-teams` | Collaborate with teams, channels, chats, and meetings. |
| Microsoft To-Do | `microsoft-todo` | Manage tasks, to-do lists, and personal productivity. |
| Miro | `miro` | Collaborate on visual whiteboards, mind maps, and team workshops. |
| Mollie | `mollie` | Use Mollie's OAuth API to access payments, refunds, customers, mandates, subscriptions, orders, settlements, invoices, balances, terminals, and onboarding data across connected merchant organizations. |
| Motive | `motive` | Use Motive OAuth to access public fleet-management APIs for companies, users, vehicles, messages, fuel purchases, groups, ELDs, inspection reports, HOS logs, locations, dispatches, documents, assets, driver performance, Motive Card data, and freight visibility. |
| Mural | `mural` | Connect Mural workspaces, rooms, murals, templates, and users via the Mural Developer Platform OAuth 2.0 API. |
| Netlify | `netlify` | Use Netlify OAuth to access the Netlify REST API on behalf of a user for sites, deploys, forms, DNS, environment variables, snippets, webhooks, teams, and related account resources. Netlify currently exposes only the public OAuth scope rather than granular API scopes. |
| NinjaOne RMM | `ninjaone-rmm` | Monitor, manage, and remotely control endpoints, organizations, and devices in NinjaOne. |
| Notion | `notion` | Organize notes, docs, and projects in one workspace. |
| Outreach | `outreach` | Outreach is a sales execution and engagement platform for managing prospects, sequences, opportunities, tasks, calls, emails, and rep workflows. Connect Outreach to sync sales engagement records and automate workflows through the Outreach REST API. |
| PagerDuty | `pagerduty` | Manage incidents, services, schedules, escalation policies, teams, and on-call data in PagerDuty. |
| PandaDoc | `pandadoc` | Use PandaDoc OAuth to create, send, download, and manage documents, templates, contacts, and related signing workflow resources. |
| Pardot | `pardot` | Pardot, now Salesforce Marketing Cloud Account Engagement, is a B2B marketing automation platform for managing prospects, campaigns, lists, forms, and lead nurturing. Connect Pardot to sync Account Engagement data through the Salesforce OAuth-backed Account Engagement API. |
| PayPal | `paypal` | Use Connect with PayPal (Log in with PayPal) to access account identity attributes such as name, email, phone, address, account type, account creation date, and verified status. |
| Pennylane | `pennylane` | Sync accounting, invoicing, banking, and ledger data from Pennylane. |
| Perk | `perk` | Use Perk's (TravelPerk) OAuth 2.0 API to access bookings, trips, invoices and expenses, cost centers, and SCIM user provisioning data. |
| Pipedrive | `pipedrive` | Use Pipedrive OAuth to access CRM data such as deals, contacts, activities, leads, products, projects, goals, users, mail, webhooks, and account settings with user-approved Marketplace scopes. |
| Podium | `podium` | Connect Podium to read messages, contacts, reviews, locations, campaigns, and payments and send outbound communications. |
| PostHog | `posthog` | Use PostHog's REST API to read and write product analytics, dashboards, insights, feature flags, experiments, session recordings, surveys, and warehouse data. |
| PreciseFP | `precisefp` | Access PreciseFP client data, accounts, engagements, forms, and documents for financial-advisor workflows. |
| Procore | `procore` | Use Procore's REST API with OAuth 2.0 to access construction management data such as projects, companies, directories, RFIs, submittals, drawings, and other resources permitted by the installed app. |
| Productboard | `productboard` | Productboard is a product management platform for centralizing customer feedback, prioritizing product work, and planning roadmaps. Connect Productboard to sync entities, notes, analytics, and member data through its public API. |
| QuickBooks | `quickbooks` | Connect QuickBooks Online to authorize Pipes to access accounting and payment data for your selected QuickBooks company. |
| QuickBooks Time | `tsheetsteam` | Sync timesheets, jobcodes, schedules, users, and reports from QuickBooks Time (TSheets). |
| Ramp | `ramp` | Manage corporate spend, cards, bills, transactions, and accounting. |
| Reapit | `reapit` | Connect to Reapit Foundations to access CRM, property, and agency data from estate-agency customers' platforms. |
| RingCentral | `ring-central` | Use RingCentral's REST API to access accounts, extensions, contacts, call logs, recordings, messages, SMS, faxes, presence, meetings, video, team messaging, and webhook subscriptions. |
| Sage | `sage` | Connect to Sage Accounting to read and write contacts, invoices, payments, products, ledger accounts, journals, and business data. |
| Sage Intacct | `sage-intacct` | Use Sage Intacct OAuth to access approved REST API resources for cloud financial management, including accounting, accounts payable, accounts receivable, customers, vendors, projects, dimensions, and related business records. |
| Salesforce | `salesforce` | Manage customer relationships, sales, and service operations. |
| Salesforce (Sandbox) | `salesforce-test` | Test a Salesforce integration with a sandbox account. |
| Salesloft | `salesloft` | Engage prospects across cadences, calls, emails, and meetings. |
| Salesmsg | `salesmsg` | Send texts, manage conversations, contacts, and calling workflows. |
| Sellsy | `sellsy` | Connect Sellsy CRM, invoicing, and accounting data including contacts, companies, opportunities, estimates, invoices, payments, items, and accounting entries. |
| Sentry | `sentry` | Monitor, track, and resolve application errors in real-time. |
| Serval | `serval` | Use Serval OAuth to obtain user-scoped access tokens for Serval's public API and MCP server. |
| ServiceM8 | `servicem8` | Access ServiceM8 field service data such as jobs, customers, schedules, staff, materials, payments, forms, and inventory. |
| signNow | `signnow` | Send documents for e-signature, manage templates, and track signing workflows in signNow. |
| Slack | `slack` | Communicate and collaborate with team channels and messages. |
| Stripe | `stripe` | Process payments, subscriptions, and financial transactions securely. |
| Stripe Connect | `stripe-connect` | Connect your Stripe account to sync payment, customer, and payout data from your connected accounts. |
| SurveyMonkey | `survey-monkey` | Access SurveyMonkey surveys, collectors, contacts, responses, webhooks, and workgroups via OAuth. |
| Teamleader Focus | `teamleader` | Manage CRM contacts, deals, invoices, and projects in Teamleader Focus. |
| TikTok | `tiktok` | Use TikTok OAuth to access approved TikTok for Developers APIs, including profile and video data, content posting, data portability exports, research datasets, local-service products and shops, and voucher management. |
| Timely | `timely` | Track time entries, projects, clients, users, tags, and reports in Timely workspaces. |
| Tremendous | `tremendous` | Send and manage rewards, orders, campaigns, funding sources, invoices, members, webhooks, and fraud reviews via the Tremendous API. |
| TriNet HR Platform (Zenefits) | `zenefits` | Sync HR data from TriNet HR Platform (Zenefits), including companies, people, employments, departments, locations, and time off. |
| Twinfield | `twinfield` | Use Twinfield's OAuth 2.0 API to read organisation and user identity, resolve the tenant cluster, and call accounting endpoints with refreshable access tokens. |
| Typeform | `typeform` | Manage Typeform forms, themes, images, responses, webhooks, and workspaces. |
| VideoAsk | `videoask` | Manage VideoAsk forms, contacts, answers, conversations, and webhooks. |
| Wave Accounting | `wave-accounting` | Manage accounting data such as businesses, invoices, customers, and transactions. |
| Wealthbox | `wealthbox` | Connect Wealthbox CRM to sync contacts, tasks, events, opportunities, projects, notes, and workflows for financial advisors. |
| Webex | `webex` | Manage Webex messaging, meetings, recordings, devices, and admin telephony. |
| Webflow | `webflow` | Use Webflow's Data API v2 to manage sites, pages, components, CMS collections, assets, ecommerce, forms, comments, custom code, users, and workspaces. |
| Workable | `workable` | Connect Workable ATS data including jobs, candidates, employees, requisitions, offers, members, scorecards, and webhook subscriptions. |
| X.com | `x-com` | Use X OAuth 2.0 to access approved X API v2 resources on behalf of users, including posts, user profiles and email, follows, Spaces, mutes, likes, lists, blocks, bookmarks, Direct Messages, and media uploads. |
| Xero | `xero` | Manage accounting, invoicing, and financial reporting for businesses. |
| Zapier | `zapier` | Automate workflows and run actions across connected apps. |
| Zendesk Sell | `zendesk-sell` | Connect Zendesk Sell CRM to sync leads, contacts, deals, tasks, notes, products, and pipeline activity. |
| Zoom | `zoom` | Integrate with Zoom to access meetings, webinars, cloud recordings, reports, team chat, and user management through Zoom's OAuth 2.0 API. |
